name: Han Fang
body:
### Welcome to Han Fang's GitHub Pages.
Han Fang received his M.S. in Applied Math & Statistics at Stony Brook University (SBU) and received his B.S. in Optical Informatics at Sun Yat-sen University. He is currently supervised by [Dr. Michael Schatz](http://schatzlab.cshl.edu/) and [Dr. Gholson Lyon](http://lyonlab.labsites.cshl.edu/) at [Cold Spring Harbor Laboratory](http://www.cshl.edu/). He is interested in genomics, human genetics and algorithm development. You can also view my CSHL page [here](http://schatzlab.cshl.edu/people/hfang/).

### Education
- 2013-Present, Ph.D in **Applied Math & Stat.** at Stony Brook University
- 2011-2013, M.S. in **Applied Math & Stat.** at Stony Brook University
- 2007-2011, B.S. in **Optical Informatics** at Sun Yat-sen University

### Publications
- **Fang H**, Wu Y, Narzisi G, O’Rawe JA, Jimenez Barron LT, Rosenbaum J, Ronemus M, Iossifov I, Schatz MC*, Lyon GJ* (2014). Reducing INDEL calling errors in whole-genome and exome sequencing data. Genome Medicine (2014) doi:10.1186/s13073-014-0089-z ([View Paper](http://genomemedicine.com/content/6/10/89/abstract))
- O’Rawe JA, Wu Y, Rope A, Jimenez Barron LT, Swensen J, **Fang H**, Mittelmann D, Highnam G, Robison R, Wang K, Lyon GJ (2014). Comprehensive whole genome sequencing of a three generation pedigree: Genetic components of a new syndrome with severe developmental delay and dysmorphic features. Submitted. ([View Preprint PDF](http://lyonlab.labsites.cshl.edu/wp-content/uploads/sites/8/2014/09/Manuscript091914.pdf))
- Narzisi G, O’Rawe JA, Iossifov I, **Fang H**, Lee Y, Wang Z, Wu Y, Lyon GJ, Wigler M, Schatz MC (2014). Accurate detection of de novo and transmitted INDELs within exome-capture data using micro-assembly. Nature Methods (2014) doi:10.1038/nmeth.3069. ([View Paper](http://www.nature.com/nmeth/journal/vaop/ncurrent/full/nmeth.3069.html))
- O’Rawe JA, **Fang H**, Rynearson S, Robison R, Kiruluta ES, Higgins G, Eilbeck K, Reese MG, Lyon GJ*, Integrating precision medicine in the study and clinical treatment of a severely mentally ill person. PeerJ (2013) DOI 10.7717/peerj.177 ([View Paper](https://peerj.com/articles/177/))

### Contact Information
Email: hanfang.cshl@gmail.com

Twitter: [@Han_Fang_](https://twitter.com/Han_Fang_)
